benefits.description: Down 21 lbs since April while using Tirz

side_effects.description: Down 20% muscle mass after using Tirz since April; regrets not using Tesamorelin and Ipamorelin alongside GLP-1 to prevent muscle loss

protocol_notes: User has been using Tirzepatide since April and lost 21 lbs but also lost 20% muscle mass. Suggests combining Tesamorelin and Ipamorelin with GLP-1 to prevent muscle loss.
